problem: Color swatch buttons have hard square corners, visible borders, blocky appearance. Images look pixelated with border artifacts.
root_cause: CSS: hard borders, insufficient border-radius, image rendering issues with object-fit
solution: Improve swatch CSS: smooth corners, no visible borders on default state, better image rendering
applicable_rules: RULE_6: KNOWN_WORKING_CODE_ONLY - Use proven CSS patterns for image thumbnails
RULE_7: EVIDENCE_BEFORE_ASSERTION - Test swatch rendering with curl before committing
RULE_16: COMPLETE_WORKFLOW_TESTING - Test locally with visual verification before push

steps.task: Analyze current CSS for swatch-btn styling
steps.action: View balloon-planner/css/style.css and identify all .swatch-btn rules
steps.output: Understand current: border-radius value, border width/color, padding, overflow
steps.verbose_comment: Current CSS has border-radius: 14px which should be smooth, but visible 1px border and hard edges on images suggest object-fit or padding issues. Will check if border is too visible on default state (not hover/active).

steps.task: Update CSS: Remove visible borders, increase border-radius, improve image rendering
steps.action: Modify .swatch-btn CSS: increase border-radius to 18-20px, make default border very subtle or transparent, improve image rendering with image-rendering CSS property
steps.output: Updated style.css with improved swatch styling
steps.verbose_comment: Changes: (1) border-radius: 18px for smooth circles, (2) border: 1px solid transparent (instead of var(--line)) for default state - border only visible on hover/active, (3) add image-rendering: crisp-edges or contain to prevent pixelation, (4) remove/reduce padding inside swatch to show full image, (5) add subtle box-shadow on default state instead of border

steps.task: Update swatch HTML/styling in main.js if needed
steps.action: Check if main.js creates swatch buttons correctly with proper sizing. Ensure images fill the button completely.
steps.output: Verify or update: button sizing is consistent, image doesn't have margins, CSS selectors are correct
steps.verbose_comment: renderSwatches() creates button elements with img children. Need to verify: (1) button width/height are equal (58px), (2) img fills 100% of button (no padding affecting layout), (3) object-fit: cover ensures image fills without distortion

steps.task: Test swatch rendering locally with curl
steps.action: Fetch HTML, verify CSS is loaded correctly, check for syntax errors
steps.output: Curl verification showing CSS HTTP 200, no syntax errors
steps.verbose_comment: Use curl to verify: (1) style.css loads HTTP 200, (2) CSS has no syntax errors (can check with CSS linter if available), (3) HTML references correct CSS file in <link> tag

steps.task: Visual test: Check swatch appearance in browser
steps.action: Open page in browser, look at color swatches - should be smooth circles with subtle borders only on hover/active, images should be clear and sharp
steps.output: Visual confirmation: swatches are smooth, not blocky, images are clear
steps.verbose_comment: User will see: (1) Default swatch: smooth rounded button with subtle shadow, thin/transparent border, clear balloon image, (2) Hover: slight lift/shadow increase, (3) Active/selected: colored border + shadow highlight, (4) No pixelation, no hard edges, professional appearance

steps.task: Verify 190 arrangements still load and filter correctly
steps.action: Test gallery functionality: click color swatch -> gallery filters, click reset -> shows all 190
steps.input: Updated CSS + existing gallery-data.js and main.js
steps.output: Confirmation: filtering still works, no regression in functionality
steps.verbose_comment: CSS-only change should not break functionality. But verify: (1) color swatches clickable (test each color), (2) gallery updates when swatch clicked, (3) reset button works, (4) no JavaScript console errors

steps.task: GIT COMMIT with description of swatch improvements
steps.action: Stage and commit CSS changes with message explaining swatch smoothing
steps.output: Git commit with message describing visual improvements
steps.verbose_comment: Commit message: 'style: Improve swatch button appearance - smooth rounded corners, subtle default borders, clear image rendering. Remove hard edges and pixelation artifacts.'
Push to GitHub. If auto-deploy configured, production will update automatically.

steps.task: VERIFY production: Check swatch appearance and functionality
steps.action: Test live app: swatches are smooth/professional, colors work, filtering works
steps.output: Visual confirmation on production that swatches look polished
steps.verbose_comment: Production verification: (1) Swatches appear smooth without blocky edges, (2) Images are clear and sharp, (3) Color filtering still works correctly, (4) Responsive on mobile, (5) No console errors

swatch_btn_before.issue: Visible line border makes edges look hard/blocky

swatch_btn_after.improvement: Transparent border hides by default, smooth 18px radius, subtle shadow adds depth, crisp-edges prevents blurring

swatch_btn_hover_after.improvement: Increased shadow on hover without border flash

swatch_btn_active_after.improvement: Border and shadow activate only when selected, not default
